<!--
Thanks for contributing to Planban.

Planban is early. Small, focused PRs are much easier to review and much more
likely to be accepted. For non-trivial features or architecture changes, please
open an issue first.

By submitting this PR, you agree that your contribution is licensed under the
MIT License.
-->

## What Changed

<!-- Describe the change clearly and keep the scope tight. -->

## Why

<!-- Explain the problem being solved and why this approach is appropriate. -->

## Validation

<!-- List the checks you ran, manual testing performed, or evidence gathered. -->

## UI / Interaction Changes

<!-- If this changes UI, include before/after screenshots.
     If this changes motion, drag/drop, browser opening, onboarding, or other
     interaction details, include a short video or exact verification steps.
     Delete this section if not applicable. -->

## AI Assistance

<!-- If an agent helped, say which one and what you reviewed manually.
     Delete this section if not applicable. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] This PR is small and focused.
- [ ] I explained what changed and why.
- [ ] I ran relevant checks or explained why they were not run.
- [ ] I removed private board contents, local paths, logs, screenshots, credentials, and personal project details.
- [ ] I opened an issue first for non-trivial feature, architecture, storage, install, update, API, MCP, or CLI contract changes.
